title: Future of AI, Simulating Reality, Physics and Video Games
excerpts: Demis Hassabis is the CEO of Google DeepMind and Nobel Prize winner for his groundbreaking work in protein structure prediction using AI.

title: DeepMind's Demis Hassabis on the future of AI (Transcript)
excerpts:
Section Title: DeepMind's Demis Hassabis on the future of AI (Transcript)
Content:
And now we've got AlphaFold, who's, hopefully it is accelerating the process a little bit, a little more reliable. We have a question that we ask all of our guests, which is also kind of a prediction question, which is really, I think there are few people in the world I would, I'd like to hear this answer more from than you, which is: in your field, what is the unsolved problem that you are most fascinated in seeing the results of or seeing the mystery solved for? If you could fast forward 10 years, what would the problem you'd most like to see solved be?
**[00:42:49] Demis Hassabis:**
Well, the one I spend most of my time thinking about and I still think is the most fascinating, outstanding problem is the notion of abstract concepts or conceptual knowledge.

title: Demis Hassabis — Scaling, superhuman AIs, AlphaZero ...
excerpts:
Section Title: Dwarkesh Podcast > Demis Hassabis — Scaling, superhuman AIs, AlphaZero atop LLMs, AlphaFold
Content:
"scaling is an artform"
[](https://substack.com/@dwarkesh)
[Dwarkesh Patel](https://substack.com/@dwarkesh)
Feb 28, 2024
25
4 2
Share
Here is my episode with Demis Hassabis, CEO of Google DeepMind
We discuss:
Why scaling is an artform
Adding search, planning, & AlphaZero type training atop LLMs
Making sure rogue nations can't steal weights
The right way to align superhuman AIs and do an intelligence explosion
Watch on [YouTube](https://youtu.be/qTogNUV3CAI) . Listen on [Apple Podcasts](https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/demis-hassabis-scaling-superhuman-ais-alphazero-atop/id1516093381?i=1000647410338) , [Spotify](https://open.spotify.com/episode/6SWbwjYPs5WevIoCCiSByS?si=nCVFSRr7QGGI_STgbrOBDA) , or any other podcast platform. Read the full transcript [here](https://www.dwarkeshpatel.com/i/142112869/transcript) .

title: The Podcast
excerpts:
Section Title: ... > Unreasonably Effective AI with Demis Hassabis
Content:
It has been a few years since Google DeepMind CEO and co-founder, Demis Hassabis, and Professor Hannah Fry caught up, and in that time, the world has caught on to artificial intelligence—in a big way. Listen in as they discuss the recent explosion of interest in AI, what Demis means when he describes chatbots as ‘unreasonably effective’, and the unexpected emergence of capabilities like conceptual understanding and abstraction in recent generative models.
Past episodes
